subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and firm one! The All-Concealing Lord is the Forgiver of sinners and the All-Bountiful, the All-Merciful, like unto an ocean outpouring its grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت پایدار حضرت ستار غفار گنهکارانست و بخشنده و مهربان چون مستفیض از بحر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
